headlines.description: — Desmond Bane matched his season high with 37 points and the Orlando Magic advanced to the NBA Cup semifinals with a 117-108 victory over the Miami Heat on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bane scores 37 to lead the Magic past the Heat 117-108 in the NBA Cup quarterfinals

events.name: New York Knicks at Toronto Raptors

headlines.description: — Jalen Brunson scored 35 points, Josh Hart added 21 and the New York Knicks advanced to the NBA Cup semifinals for the first time in three tries by beating the struggling Toronto Raptors 117-101 on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brunson scores 35 points as Knicks rout Raptors 117-101 to reach NBA Cup semifinals for first time
